# External Reference Documents — Project 005 (ibn-core RFC 9315 Layer-Agnostic Core)

Place external reference documents here (PDFs, prior design notes, upstream
specs) for ArcKit commands to read and cite. ArcKit produces inline citations
traceable to the Document Register in generated artifacts (see
`arckit-claude/references/citation-instructions.md`).

Useful material for this project:

- RFC 9315 (Intent-Based Networking) — the phase model being made layer-agnostic.
- ibn-core v2.1.x reuse-surface notes / package entry (the as-is to refactor).
- resource-intent-agent `ARC-004-ADR-010` and `ARC-004-REQ` v1.3 (the consumer
  constraint this project removes) — by reference; the private repo is the source.
- The 004 build dashboard items D4 (heavy transitive footprint) and D6
  (under-exported phase enums) — the concrete entry-point fixes.
